# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download and deploy')
        string(name: 'PROD_SERVERS', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Deployment path on production servers')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',')
                    def artifactsDir = "artifacts"
                    sh "mkdir -p ${artifactsDir}"
                    
                    artifactUrls.each { url ->
                        def fileName = url.split('/').last()
                        sh "curl -L -o ${artifactsDir}/${fileName} ${url}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PROD_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def artifactsDir = "artifacts"
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        sh "ssh ${server} 'mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'"
                        sh "scp -r ${artifactsDir}/* ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
